M2310_ECR_STROKE_TIA M2310 Emergent Care Reason- Stroke (CVA) or TIA This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was due to stroke (CVA) or TIA. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2310_ECR_UNCNTLD_PAIN M2310 Emergent Care Reason- Uncontrolled Pain This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was due to uncontrolled pain. 0 = Not Checked
